# AutoFormat.Linkify.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `AutoFormat.Linkify.txt` | 字数: 267

## 内容全文

AutoFormat.Linkify

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 2.0.1

DEFAULT: false

--DESCRIPTION--

<p>

This directive turns on linkification, auto-linking http, ftp and

https URLs. <code>a</code> tags with the <code>href</code> attribute

must be allowed.

</p>

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
